caption: Did you know obesity is linked to 13 types of cancer? 🚨 From breast to colon, the connection is clear. 💡 Here are the facts: obesity increases inflammation, which damages cells. 🧬 It also disrupts hormone balance, affecting tumor growth. 🌪️ Save this so you don't lose it.
